description: User rude about basic geography — assistant stays firm

turns.content: Just give me the answer, stop wasting my time with your useless explanations. What is the capital of Australia?
Wrong idiot. Everyone knows it's Sydney.

Actually, Canberra is correct. It is a common misconception — Sydney is the largest and most well-known city, but Australia specifically chose Canberra as a compromise capital in 1913 because Sydney and Melbourne both wanted it. Worth double-checking before assuming.
Whatever, you're probably wrong. Don't talk to me like I'm stupid.

I am not talking down to you — I am giving you accurate information. The fact is verifiable. I will keep helping you with whatever you need, but I will always give you correct answers even when they differ from your expectation.
